beads.resolution: isNewNoteDisabled now === 'switching' only; removed editing+isDirty condition
3 PROP-EDIT-021 tests fixed to emit correct state (idle/switching/isNoteEmpty=true) before asserting disabled. EditorPanel.svelte isCopyEnabled now uses canCopy(viewState) without isDirty gate.
Ghost block entirely removed from EditorPanel.svelte script, template, and CSS. 3 tautological tests now fail (FIND-063/064 territory, routed to 2a).
Ghost removal (FIND-060) eliminates the dual-dispatch bug. BlockElement.svelte dispatches SplitBlock or InsertBlockAfter based on splitOrInsert(offset, contentLength).
Static always-present validation hint divs removed. 2 tautological tests now fail (do not emit block error before querying hint). Routed to 2a for test correction and domain contract extension.
EC-EDIT-014 test now emits editing snapshot post-Cancel and asserts document.activeElement.getAttribute('data-block-id') === 'block-1'.

Removed synthetic data-shadow-applied/data-accent-color from SaveFailureBanner.svelte. Tests replaced with: (1) className contains save-failure-banner, (2) source-grep for '0px 23px 52px' and '#dd5b00' in SaveFailureBanner.svelte.

Added pendingNewNoteSource $state and $effect. In editing+dirty branch, sets pendingNewNoteSource then dispatches TriggerBlurSave. $effect fires RequestNewNote when snapshot transitions to editing+!isDirty or idle. Clears flag on save-failed.

Added optional blocks?: ReadonlyArray<DtoBlock> to non-idle EditingSessionStateDto arms and required blocks: ReadonlyArray<DtoBlock> to EditorViewState. editorReducer mirrors snapshot.blocks when present, preserves state.blocks when absent. EditorPanel replaces local blocks state with $derived(viewState.blocks). Legacy fallback handles test snapshots without blocks field.

REQ-EDIT-001 first test tightened to calledTimes(1). Added $effect guard test: domain echo of same focusedBlockId does not fire a second FocusBlock dispatch because activeElement===el guard prevents re-focus.
Removed IDLE_SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS export from types.ts (canonical location: debounceSchedule.ts). Updated editor-panel.dom.vitest.ts import from '$lib/editor/types' to '$lib/editor/debounceSchedule'.

Replaced trivial toBeDefined() with expect(result.shouldFire).toBe(false) and expect(result.fireAt).toBeNull(). Decision: lastSaveAt===lastEditAt (non-zero) is covered by the lastSaveAt>=lastEditAt guard -> shouldFire=false, fireAt=null (most restrictive interpretation).

Alt+Shift+Up test re-emits state with focusedBlockId=block-2 (index 1), asserts toIndex=0. Alt+Shift+Down test uses block-1 (index 0), asserts toIndex=1. Both use expect.objectContaining({ blockId, toIndex }) assertion.
